notes: WMS inbound Excel import/export/delete-preview now has real Chrome API/UI coverage: the browser downloads the inbound template, uploads it back for Excel import, verifies supplier/department/sub-project/inventory association by API, exports inbound records, previews cascade inventory impact, deletes the inbound order, and verifies it is absent from the active API list. Full Chrome smoke is 25/25. Inventory alert / 库存预警 remains explicitly out of scope and must not be restored. Product Green remains Yellow for production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download beyond current slices.
